## Meeting Purpose

[Review blog performance and align on the content strategy roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The new blog is showing positive traction, with branded signups and organic traffic growing. A one-pager will be created to consolidate performance data and build a clear success narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [The immediate focus is ramping up the "expert coder" content cluster to 50 articles/week by early Dec. This is a critical test to validate the content model before expanding to other personas like "finance."](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [An unidentified source is driving large, unexplained social traffic spikes from LinkedIn/Twitter. This will be investigated to determine if it's an opportunity to double down on.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [A new pixel de-anonymizes site visitors, providing their LinkedIn profiles for high-touch recruiting (e.g., for exclusive programs), a strategy distinct from standard ad retargeting.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance & Analytics

  - [**Overall Traction:** Positive signals after two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Branded signups are increasing.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [Organic traffic is growing, with articles indexing quickly on Google.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Top Performer:** "Top job marketplaces" article is driving high-intent developer traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**Unexplained Social Spikes:**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [Large traffic spikes from LinkedIn/Twitter are occurring, which Surge AI did not expect as they are not promoting the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Users click a social ad → visit a company profile → click a recent blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Action:** Investigate the source. Since these visitors convert, it may be an opportunity to amplify.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Analytics Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [The Amplitude funnel for the assessment process is unclear to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [**Action:** Surge AI will share pre-built Amplitude reports to provide this visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Content Strategy & Roadmap

  - [**Current Focus: "Expert Coder" Cluster**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Goal:** Validate the content model with a critical mass of articles for a single persona before expanding.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [**Publishing Cadence:** Ramping up from 30/week to 50/week by early December.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Content Focus:** Job prep, interview tips, and data structures/algorithms.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Future Focus: "Finance" Cluster**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Expansion to the "finance" persona depends on positive signals from the "expert coder" test.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [**Model:** Replicate the successful coder strategy, targeting finance-specific sites like Wall Street Oasis.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Other Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [**FAQ:** Content update is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [**Testimonials:** Internal shaping is underway; will be shared with GrowthX to map production effort.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Programmatic Content:** On hold until automated publishing workflows are finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**AI Training Articles:** Exploring a hybrid model (e.g., 2-3/week) to balance with the high-volume coder push.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

### New Tools & Tactics

  - [**De-anonymization Pixel:**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Function:** Identifies site visitors and provides their LinkedIn profiles and emails.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Use Case:** High-touch recruiting for exclusive programs, allowing for direct outreach instead of just ad retargeting.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**CTA Experimentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The current "Join the Community" CTA is ineffective because it misrepresents the user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Action:** Test alternatives like "Start Earning."](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason G (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [Create a one-pager summarizing blog performance and the success narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [Set up the de-anonymization pixel and share a Loom tutorial.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Launch CTA experiments (e.g., "Start Earning").](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**Jason S (Surge AI):**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Share pre-built Amplitude funnel reports with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Liz (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Share testimonial content requirements with Surge AI after internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [Adjust communication for the US Thanksgiving holiday next week.](https://fathom.video/share/LVkecqiRrFM3cRyix4YG7UgYx8sPkX87?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
